x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Custom business rules on project and demand tables can conflict with Now Assist SPM AI workflow automation.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review custom Business Rules on pm_project, dmn_demand, resource_plan, and pm_milestone. Test Now Assist SPM with customizations enabled in a sub-production instance. Consider deactivating or consolidating redundant BRs.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851ce9
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Custom business rules on project and demand tables can conflict with Now Assist SPM AI workflow automation.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>SPM Customization Risk</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_script');
    ga.addQuery('collection', 'IN', 'pm_project,dmn_demand,resource_plan,pm_milestone');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addQuery('sys_created_by', 'NOT IN', 'glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy');
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' custom Business Rules on SPM tables';

    if (count <= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Low SPM customization risk (' + count + ' custom BRs). Now Assist SPM AI workflow automation is unlikely to encounter conflicts.'
        };
    } else if (count <= 10) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' custom BRs on SPM tables. Moderate customization risk — test Now Assist SPM in sub-production before enabling in production.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'High SPM customization risk: ' + count + ' custom BRs on core SPM tables. Now Assist SPM AI workflow automation may conflict with existing customizations.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>SPM</module>
<number>CHK0006102</number>
<order>110</order>
<remediation_guidance>Review custom Business Rules on pm_project, dmn_demand, resource_plan, and pm_milestone. Test Now Assist SPM with customizations enabled in a sub-production instance. Consider deactivating or consolidating redundant BRs.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851ce9</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
